summary: I will analyze the codebase to synthesize a comprehensive architectural overview, a detailed developer file guide, and an updated main README reflecting the current project state.

plan.title: Analyze System Architecture
plan.description: Examine the relationship between the Split Context API (Document vs UI), the core math engines in `client/src/core`, and the export logic in `useExport.ts` to document the logical flow.

plan.title: Create architecture.md
plan.description: Draft the architectural overview, highlighting the 'Split Context' pattern, coordinate transformation logic (Screen TL to PDF BL), and the vector export pipeline.

plan.title: Create DEV_README.md
plan.description: Map every significant file in `client/` and `server/` to its functional responsibility, describing how they communicate (e.g., TanStack Query for API, Context for local state).

plan.title: Update README.md
plan.description: Refresh the main README to include current features like Status Life Cycle, Auto-Numbering, multi-tenancy auth, and database persistence (Drizzle/Postgres).

acceptance_criteria.description: File `architecture.md` exists and contains sections for 'Overview', 'State Management (Split Context)', and 'Coordinate Transformation'.
acceptance_criteria.how_to_verify: Verify file existence and presence of specified headers.

acceptance_criteria.description: File `DEV_README.md` exists and provides a file-by-file description for at least 15 core files in `client/src` and `server/`.
acceptance_criteria.how_to_verify: Check file content for mapping of core files like `editor-context.tsx`, `useExport.ts`, `routes.ts`, and `schema.ts`.

acceptance_criteria.description: `README.md` is updated to mention the Postgres/Drizzle backend and the current 'Network Passportization' features.
acceptance_criteria.how_to_verify: Check `README.md` for 'Tech Stack' updates (Postgres, Drizzle) and 'Key Features' section updates.

acceptance_criteria.description: The logic flow of object creation and PDF export is explicitly described in `architecture.md`.
acceptance_criteria.how_to_verify: Verify the 'Logic Flow' section in `architecture.md` covers the path from UI interaction to `pdf-lib` execution.

risks: Omission of critical backend routes or schema details if not fully scanned.
Documentation becoming outdated if recently added features (like the latest status tracking) are missed.
Overlapping content between `architecture.md` and `DEV_README.md` creating maintenance burden.
